subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the heavenly wine and ablaze with the fire of divine love! Not a moment passeth, by day or night, except [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مدهوش صهبای الهی و پرجوش در آتش محبت ربانی در شب و روز آنی نمیگذرد مگر
subcodes.subjects: @the Adamic cycle and the Baha'i cycle, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
